picks.quote: I would bet you anything you want to bet right now that Justin Gate fighting Patty Pimble is going to be fun as hell for however long it goes. Like it's Justin Gatechi. is the most proven commodity ending the night.

I think we all think Ilia could beat Armen, but I also think we all acknowledge that's his toughest fight. So, let's give him an easier one... they would rather Ilia Turya not fight Armen, which he could win.
